steps.title: Identify the relationship
steps.content: Sentence before the blank introduces a technical term: the 899 BCE eclipse was annular. Sentence after the blank defines what "annular" means — the Moon didn't fully cover the Sun, creating a ring. This is a definition/clarification.

steps.title: Pick the transition
steps.content:
That is introduces a restatement/clarification — perfect fit. For example would give an instance, but the second sentence isn't an example of annular eclipses; it's the definition. Meanwhile signals simultaneity (wrong). Nonetheless signals contrast (wrong).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
